columns.name: Group
columns.comment: Same group of client companies will result in Vendors, Gls and POes being filtered per group rather than individual company code.

columns.name: AccessClient
columns.comment: Client UI access: Yes=Editable, No=Read-only, Hidden=Not visible

columns.name: AccessInternal
columns.comment: Internal admin access: Yes=Editable, No=Read-only, Hidden=Not visible

columns.name: Dependency
columns.comment: Parameter that must be set before this one
